text:
Doster (ドースター, Dōsutā) is a Hunter and a former Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Appearance

Doster has forest green hair in the 2011 anime adaptation and black hair in the 1999 anime adaptation, with brown eyes in both. He has a tall, muscular body, two red stripes below his eyes, and three red points on his forehead. He wears a thick gold headband and a sleeveless dark red and yellow vest.

Plot

Greed Island arc

He is among the group of 21 Nen users including Gon and Killua hired by Battera to complete Greed Island. 

Eventually, Doster's name appears in Gon's binder with a gray dot beside it, indicating that he has either left the game or passed away. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Doster is capable enough to have passed the notoriously difficult Hunter Exam. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Doster is capable of utilizing Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 and it can be assumed that he is moderately skilled at it since he was approved by Tsezguerra.

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Doster's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
